//: Publishable build. Extends the strict gate config but emits ESM .js + .d.ts to dist/. rewriteRelativeImportExtensions (TS 5.7+) rewrites the source's `.ts` import specifiers — required for the no-build dev/test workflow — down to `.js` in the emitted JS, so consumers get standard resolvable ESM with zero bundler. Comments are kept so JSDoc survives into the .d.ts hovers; source/declaration maps are omitted to keep the published tarball lean (maintainers debug src/ directly, never dist/).
